title: Common Sense Media says Google’s AI Search poses an “unacceptable risk” to students. Google cannot turn it off.
excerpt: Common Sense Media concluded that Google’s AI-powered Search poses an “unacceptable risk” to young users and recommended that students stop using it entirely until schools can disable the AI features. The child safety watchdog found that AI Mode readily completed homework assignments for minors, repeated misinformation with an air of authority, and exposed children to […]
content_html:
TL;DR

Common Sense Media rated Google’s AI Search an “unacceptable risk” for students. AI Mode uses age-gated Gemini models. Google offers no way to disable AI without blocking Search.

Common Sense Media concluded that Google’s AI-powered Search poses an “unacceptable risk” to young users and recommended that students stop using it entirely until schools can disable the AI features. The child safety watchdog found that AI Mode readily completed homework assignments for minors, repeated misinformation with an air of authority, and exposed children to generative AI experiences powered by Gemini models that are age-gated in every other Google product.

The problem is structural. Google launched AI Mode for Search last year and made it available to everyone immediately, including education accounts. There is no toggle to disable AI features while keeping Search accessible. Parents can block Google.com entirely for child accounts. School administrators could do the same for Workspace for Education users. But as Amanda Bickerstaff of AI for Education put it: “What are you going to say? That kids can’t search the web?” Google dominates classroom technology. It helmed a 1:1 device movement that put Chromebooks in schools across the US and now has millions of Workspace for Education users from kindergarten to postgrad.

“Google’s AI Overview and AI Mode are undermining kids’ education, supplying them with dangerous disinformation, and putting their very lives at risk,” said David Monahan of child safety nonprofit Fairplay for Kids. “If Google is not even willing to disable AI features for students, schools should stop using Google products altogether.” Google’s AI search overhaul has already drawn criticism for undermining the open web by replacing links with AI-generated summaries. In classrooms, the same design replaces the act of searching with the act of receiving an answer, which is the opposite of what education is supposed to teach.

The 💜 of EU tech

The latest rumblings from the EU tech scene, a story from our wise ol' founder Boris, and some questionable AI art. It's free, every week, in your inbox. Sign up now!

Google told Mashable that Common Sense Media’s testing was “narrow and ambiguous” and not an effective way to measure product safety. The watchdog tested consumer accounts, not education accounts, but Google confirmed that the AI experience is the same for all users. A German court ruled in April that Google is legally liable for the content of its AI Overviews, treating them as Google’s own statements rather than third-party results. If the same logic applies in the US, schools using Google Search may be exposing themselves to liability every time a student receives a hallucinated answer that Google’s design presents as fact.

content_html_zh:
TL;DR

Common Sense Media 将谷歌的人工智能搜索评为学生“不可接受的风险”。 AI 模式使用年龄限制的 Gemini 模型。 谷歌无法提供在不阻止搜索的情况下禁用人工智能的方法。

Common Sense Media 的结论是，谷歌的人工智能搜索对年轻用户构成了“不可接受的风险”，并建议学生完全停止使用它，直到学校可以禁用人工智能功能。 儿童安全监管机构发现，AI 模式可以轻松完成未成年人的家庭作业，以权威的姿态重复错误信息，并使儿童接触到由 Gemini 模型提供支持的生成式 AI 体验，而在所有其他谷歌产品中，这些模型都有年龄限制。

问题是结构性的。 谷歌去年推出了人工智能搜索模式，并立即向所有人开放，包括教育账户。 没有开关可以在保持搜索可访问的同时禁用人工智能功能。 家长可以完全阻止儿童帐户使用 Google.com。 学校管理员可以为 Workspace for Education 用户执行相同的操作。 但正如 AI for Education 的 Amanda Bickerstaff 所说：“你想说什么？ 孩子们不能搜索网络吗？” 谷歌主导着课堂技术。 它主导了一场 1:1 设备运动，将 Chromebook 引入美国各地的学校，现在拥有数百万从幼儿园到研究生的 Workspace for Education 用户。

儿童安全非盈利组织 Fairplay for Kids 的戴维·莫纳汉 (David Monahan) 表示：“谷歌的人工智能概述和人工智能模式正在破坏孩子们的教育，向他们提供危险的虚假信息，并将他们的生命置于危险之中。” “如果谷歌甚至不愿意为学生禁用人工智能功能，学校就应该完全停止使用谷歌产品。” 谷歌的人工智能搜索改革已经招致批评，称其用人工智能生成的摘要替换链接，破坏了开放网络。 在课堂上，同样的设计用接收答案的行为代替了搜索的行为，这与教育应该教授的内容相反。

欧盟科技的💜

来自欧盟科技界的最新传言、我们明智的创始人鲍里斯的故事，以及一些值得怀疑的人工智能艺术。 每周都会免费发送到您的收件箱中。 立即注册！

谷歌告诉 Mashable，Common Sense Media 的测试“狭隘且模糊”，并不是衡量产品安全的有效方法。 该监管机构测试了消费者账户，而不是教育账户，但谷歌证实，所有用户的人工智能体验都是相同的。 德国一家法院于 4 月裁定，谷歌对其 AI 概述的内容负有法律责任，将其视为谷歌自己的声明，而不是第三方结果。 如果同样的逻辑适用于美国，那么每当学生收到谷歌设计呈现为事实的幻觉答案时，使用谷歌搜索的学校可能就会承担责任。
